governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: patients (read_write) covered by RegisterPatient (write), BookAppointment (read), UpdatePatientProfile (read_write). appointments (read_write) covered by BookAppointment (read_write). records (read_write) covered by RetrieveRecords (read). Note: records write operation is not assigned to any child because no child performs record creation or modification. If records write is required by parent, a new child must be added.
